title: ROARING
description: Brace yourself for one of the Roaring Knight, one of the most Difficult Bosses you've ever fought in a Minecraft Mod. The Knight is fast, smart and uses Attacks that give ''Dark Damage'', which goes trough any type of Health Protection, so be warned.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ca1c71ab9b2a4c9c333c32a49ba07e329dfbd26.png)

Brace yourself for one of the Roaring Knight, one of the most Difficult Bosses you've ever fought in a Minecraft Mod. The Knight is fast, smart and uses Attacks that give ''Dark Damage'', which goes trough any type of Health Protection, so be warned.

!!This Mod is still Work in Progress and many things can be Changed or Reweorked later on. So don't be suprised if some things are not Polished or Bugged!!

![knife](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8f95e2d581294f114fb88ea34e2c2b36db4165c_0.webp)

The knife is an important item in this mod. You need it to open a Dark Fountain. But to do this, it must be dark. You also need a bit of space. It can be crafted, so it's easy to get, but don't keep it open for too long...

![shade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5aa4f7d3cb2d982a6dc0da9a8f895bdcba9d2b3_0.webp)

Shades are pesky little creatures, they form from the Dark Fountains presence in the Overworld, if it's open for too long. They are hostile to Players and try to kill them from preventing them to close the Fountain again. They drop important Rescources, which are needet for many things in this Mod.

![knight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/781a446bec7340533b8dfd072f102458693889a8_0.webp)

The Roaring Knight. It's one of the Strongest Beings in Deltarune. If you enter the Dark World, the Knight will know and come to stop you. The Fight gets progressively harder the less HP the Knight has, so be prepared for one of the hardest Bosses you ever faced. Dying here is more than guaranteed...

(Also, the Knight can only be fought once per day)



Credits
Toby Fox gave the Idea of this whole Mod. Also He composed the Track ''Black Knife'' that plays during the Fight.
HolySeyhan for Develeping the Mod

If Bugs or Issues in the Mod are found, then please let me know by Posting your Bugs and Issues on my Discord or just Contact me Private.

You can use this Mod in Modpacks
